title: Bridget's Mall

reviews.name: Fatima L.
reviews.text: Clean, accessible and affordable for the area. Recommend it.

description:
Located right beside the Ondo Road Expressway
Affordable spaces
Available Sizes & Prices (1-Year Rent):
- 200sqm – ₦150K  
- 300sqm – ₦250K  
- 800sqm – ₦600K  

Features:
- Modern design with PVC/POP ceilings, tiled floors, sliding glass doors/windows  
- Toilet amenities, backup power, security & surveillance  
- Parking with outdoor relaxation pavilion  
- Free business promotion via Bridget's Mall marketing  

Perfect for: Retailers, makeup studios, offices, remote service providers, fashion designers, etc.
